accountHolderCode.description: The code of the account holder.

bankAccountUUID.description: The Adyen-generated unique alphanumeric identifier (UUID) of the account holder's bank account.

invalidFields.description: Contains field validation errors that would prevent requests from being processed.

merchantReferences.description: List of the `reference` values from the `split` array in the request.

pspReference.description: The reference of a request. Can be used to uniquely identify the request.
